schema_note: Hybrid agent — Copilot Studio + Power Automate + Azure Function
name: Copilot Readiness Assessor
description: Assesses organizational readiness for M365 Copilot deployment: license prerequisites, data governance posture, SharePoint content quality, sensitivity label coverage, and user training readiness.

conversation_starters.text: How ready are we to deploy M365 Copilot to all users?
Which departments have the cleanest SharePoint data for Copilot?
What are the top blockers for our Copilot rollout?

components.power_automate: Scheduled readiness scans and progress tracking
components.azure_function: Large-scale SharePoint content quality analysis and sensitivity label coverage computation
